2604.09527.title: Envisioning the Future, One Step at a Time
2604.09527.paper_summary: Accurately anticipating how complex, diverse scenes will evolve requires models that represent uncertainty, simulate along extended interaction chains, and efficiently explore many plausible futures. Yet most existing approaches rely on dense video or latent-space prediction, expending substantial capacity on dense appearance rather than on the underlying sparse trajectories of points in the scene. This makes large-scale exploration of future hypotheses costly and limits performance when long-horizon, multi-modal motion is essential. We address this by formulating the prediction of open-set future scene dynamics as step-wise inference over sparse point trajectories. Our autoregressive diffusion model advances these trajectories through short, locally predictable transitions, explicitly modeling the growth of uncertainty over time. This dynamics-centric representation enables fast rollout of thousands of diverse futures from a single image, optionally guided by initial constraints on motion, while maintaining physical plausibility and long-range coherence. We further introduce OWM, a benchmark for open-set motion prediction based on diverse in-the-wild videos, to evaluate accuracy and variability of predicted trajectory distributions under real-world uncertainty. Our method matches or surpasses dense simulators in predictive accuracy while achieving orders-of-magnitude higher sampling speed, making open-set future prediction both scalable and practical. Project page: http://compvis.github.io/myriad.
2604.09527.paper_summary_zh: 準確預測複雜多樣的場景如何演變需要能夠表示不確定性的模型，沿著延長的互動鏈進行模擬，並有效探索多種合理的未來。然而，大多數現有的方法依賴於密集視頻或潛在空間預測，將大量資源花費在密集的外觀上，而不是場景中點的基本稀疏軌跡上。這使得對未來假設的大規模探索變得昂貴，並在長期、多模態運動至關重要時限制了性能。我們通過將開放集未來場景動態的預測公式化為對稀疏點軌跡的逐步推理來解決這個問題。我們的自回歸擴散模型通過短期、局部可預測的轉變推進這些軌跡，明確建模不確定性隨時間的增長。這種以動態為中心的表示使得從單一圖像快速推出數千種多樣的未來成為可能，並可選擇根據運動的初始約束進行引導，同時保持物理上的合理性和長距離的一致性。我們進一步介紹了OWM，一個基於多樣化的野外視頻的開放集運動預測基準，用於評估在現實世界不確定性下預測軌跡分佈的準確性和變異性。我們的方法在預測準確性上與密集模擬器相匹配或超越，同時實現了數量級更高的取樣速度，使得開放集未來預測既可擴展又實用。項目頁面：http://compvis.github.io/myriad。
2604.09527.author: Stefan Andreas Baumann et.al.
2604.09527.authors: Stefan Andreas Baumann, Jannik Wiese, Tommaso Martorella, Mahdi M. Kalayeh, Björn Ommer
